category_sources: source_facts.description says it adds geographic object support to PostgreSQL; official PostGIS docs describe it as a PostgreSQL spatial extension.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is postgis; official homepage brands the project as PostGIS.
docs_sources: Official postgis.net documentation page links getting started, official manual, tips, training, and FAQ.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official PostGIS source-code page states the official Git repository is hosted at OSGeo.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies geographic objects for PostgreSQL; official documentation presents PostGIS as the PostgreSQL spatial database extension.
